extra.reason: All 12 drawer HTML blocks extracted into _includes/character-sheet/drawers/, character-sheet.md reduced from 1447 to 1076 lines, byte-identical rendered output confirmed, all 1511 tests pass
All 11 tab panels + nav bar extracted into _includes/character-sheet/tabs/, character-sheet.md reduced from 1076 to 48 lines, byte-identical rendered output confirmed, all tests pass

Coordination bead complete. Character sheet is fully modularized: 15 controllers, DrawerManager infrastructure, 12 drawer includes, 10 tab includes, and character-sheet.js reduced to 213 lines of pure initialization/wiring.

DrawerManager (140 lines) provides reusable open/close/lifecycle/backdrop/escape infrastructure. Used consistently by QuestController, LibraryController, CharacterController, AbilityController, and questInfoDrawers. 12 drawer HTML includes extracted.
character-sheet.js is 213 lines of pure initialization and wiring. All domain logic lives in controllers, services, and dedicated modules. No business logic remains in the orchestrator.
Implemented tos_project_save_summary: upserts keeper_name, level, school, sanctum, background, schema_version, books_count, quests_completed, items_count from snapshot JSONB.
Implemented tos_project_inventory: delete-and-replace from equippedItems, inventoryItems, passiveItemSlots, passiveFamiliarSlots arrays.
Implemented tos_project_quests: delete-and-replace from activeAssignments, completedQuests, discardedQuests arrays.
All three projection writers (hhc, ujb, fhb) implemented in single migration. Stubs replaced with real upsert/delete-replace logic.

Added logSyncEvent() to cloudSync.js. All sync operations (push/pull/noop/conflict_push/conflict_pull/error) now insert a row into tos_sync_events. Fire-and-forget — logging failures never break sync. 8 tests cover all event types.

Hybrid cloud-save projections and observability complete: projection functions (hhc/ujb/fhb), sync event logging (68n), snapshot metadata (bak/f5u) all implemented. Only troubleshooting docs (2yb) remain as independent follow-up.

Tags for backgrounds complete. Converted Archivist (genre→tagMatch) and Prophet (hasTag→tagMatch) conditions. Added historical-fiction and mythology tags. Fixed pre-existing bug where background effects never fired through pipeline because StateAdapter lacked formData — fixed via Object.create wrapper in RewardCalculator.calculateFinalRewards.

Added 'Responds to:' tag badges on item cards. extractItemTagGroups extracts deduplicated tagMatch groups from item effects, renderItemTagBadges renders them with AND (+) and OR (or) connectors. 16 new tests, all passing.
